falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if both (a) the average treatment effect on the treated for FTA accession on 5yr-post real-GDP-per-capita cumulative log-growth is positive and significant at p<0.05, AND (b) the corresponding ATT on 5yr-post trade-openness is positive and significant at p<0.05 (mechanism check). PARTIAL if (b) holds but (a) is insignificant — accession increased trade but didn't measurably move growth, the weak Ricardian win. REFUTED if (a) is wrong-signed at p<0.05. INFORMATIVE: drop EU-accession events; the coefficient should survive at >50% of full-sample magnitude.

variables_missing.name: fta_accession_indicator
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 in accession year and 5yr post-window for each country-FTA event identified from WTO RTA-IS database (publicly listed accession dates)
